summary: All 5 workers completed review-only audit of docs/CI/tests readiness for metaswarm and SwarmMesh
key_findings: CI workflow has no metaswarm commander launch, premium model enforcement, or bounded spawning tests
Smoke tests validate only static metadata contract and presentation; no runtime commander/telemetry/Depth Guard verification
Depth Guard lint enforces bounded spawning strings but lacks runtime numeric validation and partial/failure handling checks
README install claims vs install.sh reality: mismatch on file count ("Six files" vs 7-8 actual artifacts), undocumented stampede-demo install and auto-launch
AGENTS.md and README.md are fully aligned on metaswarm 50×5=250 capabilities; SwarmMesh term missing from both files
consensus: Strong consensus across all workers: current testing validates static structure/metadata but lacks runtime metaswarm execution verification
